author: leanderriefel
title: queue_order stringly-typed mixed domain model
summary: queue_order: list[str] mixes real issue IDs with synthetic workflow/triage/subjective IDs via string prefixes. All 8 code references verified: prefix-based dispatch scattered across reconcile, resolve, override_handlers, operations_queue, display, and schema_migrations. SYNTHETIC_PREFIXES is centralized but not used everywhere (override_handlers duplicates, display.py omits subjective::). Common Python trade-off — works correctly, no bugs.
